# FTW field-boundary predictions — Tanzania, United Republic of

Country code: TZ. Partitions: 44.

Each polygon carries a `confidence` value (0–100): the modeled PRUE confidence sampled at the field's point-on-surface from the 500 m confidence COG (the `predictions/confidence` collection), rescaled `raw / 0.578178 * 100` and clamped to 100 (cells with no data become null). 0.578178 is treated as 100%, matching the FTW inference app; this centroid sample is the closest single value to the app's `confidence_mean`. Recommended default reliability filter: confidence >= 69 (raw 0.4). Confidence reflects cell-level model reliability, not individual-polygon geometric accuracy. Generated by `add_confidence.py` (+ `process_partition.sh`, `run_rails.sh`, `make_pmtiles.py`): https://github.com/fieldsoftheworld/ftw-portolan/blob/main/scripts/add_confidence.py

## Files
- `TZ_01.parquet` (GeoParquet) + `TZ_01.pmtiles` (vector tiles)
